basic_details.job_title: ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICFRE Forest Research Institute (ICFRE FRI) Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the ICFRE Forest Research Institute (https://fri.icfre.gov.in). A total of 1 Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) vacancy has been announced through the ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years as on 09-03-2026. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with permanent registration, Minimum 2 years experience as General Physician, MD/MS (desirable)
qualification.details: MBBS degree from a recognized Indian Institution/University with permanent registration certificate from Medical Council of India/States. At least 02 years working experience as General Physician in any Government/Semi-Government/Recognized Hospital. Desirable: M.D./M.S. degree in allopathic system.

salary_details.details: For 2-5 years experience: Rs. 59,500/- + DA Per Month For 5-10 years experience: Rs. 65,000/- + DA Per Month For >10 years experience: Rs. 75,400/- + DA Per Month Salary is as per 7th CPC.

content_sections.heading: ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.icfre_forest_research_institute: MBBS with permanent registration, Minimum 2 years experience as General Physician, MD/MS (desirable)

content_sections.heading: ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICFRE FRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS degree from a recognized Indian Institution/University with permanent registration certificate from Medical Council of India/States. At least 02 years working experience as General Physician in any Government/Semi-Government/Recognized Hospital. Desirable: M.D./M.S. degree in allopathic system.

content_sections.heading: ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years as on 09-03-2026. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: For 2-5 years experience: Rs. 59,500/- + DA Per Month For 5-10 years experience: Rs. 65,000/- + DA Per Month For >10 years experience: Rs. 75,400/- + DA Per Month Salary is as per 7th CPC.

content_sections.heading: ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICFRE FRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) post is scheduled to be held on 24th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICFRE FRI?
faq.answer: ICFRE Forest Research Institute has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Allopathic Doctor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized Indian Institution/University with permanent registration and at least 2 years of experience as a General Physician. An MD/MS degree is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Allopathic Doctor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) post is 50 years as of 09th March 2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Allopathic Doctor role?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 59,500/- to Rs. 75,400/- per month plus DA, depending on the years of experience, as per the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ICFRE FRI Allopathic Doctor Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ICFRE Forest Research Institute, Dehradun, Uttarakhand, 248006. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment for the Allopathic Doctor (General Physician) post is on a contractual basis.
